/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/file_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/file_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/display_view.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/command_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/undo_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hexedit.dir/src/search.cpp.o -o hexedit  /usr/local/opt/ncurses/lib/libncurses.dylib /usr/local/opt/ncurses/lib/libform.dylib
